rows.label: qev065206_MSG0001
rows.name:
—How did it go? Were you able
to infiltrate the area where
the three sisters are?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065206_MSG0002
rows.name:
—What? There is a barrier set
up and you can't advance?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065206_MSG0003
rows.name:
I am certain it was that kind of
security when I was there as well...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065206_MSG0004
rows.name:
Please find three keys. The
Definians and Milsaadi divide
and manage them respectively.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065206_MSG0005
rows.name:
They likely don't expect anyone to
infiltrate, so they might just be
left lying around nearby, but...—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065206_MSG0006
rows.name:
At any rate, if you gather the three,
you should be able to reach the place
where they live. I'm leaving it to you.[ST:wait ]
